title: GROUP_ADD: any authed user can add members to any group without being a member
description: ws.rs:1368-1504 — GROUP_ADD validates rate limit, member_pub_id format, user_exists, and group existence, but never checks that the calling pub_id is itself a member (or creator) of the target group. Any authenticated user who has observed a group_id (e.g. from GROUP_DELIVER or GROUP_LIST) can call GROUP_ADD with an arbitrary group_id and add any enrolled user to that group, bypassing the intent that only members can invite others. Fix: add is_group_member(params.group_id, pub_id.0) check before add_group_member_capped, identical to the membership check in GROUP_SEND (line 1762).
